text: Moving from one space to another, I am aware of an atmosphere of anticipation and reflection. The first image suggests transition—two people walk ahead, possibly towards a presentation. I feel a sense of subtle excitement, tinged with curiosity about what knowledge or ideas await in the room ahead. In the second image, the text and displays envelop me in a sense of inquiry. The wall encourages me to ponder the boundaries between clarity and confusion, reminding me that even small actions can cloud perception. Here, I feel introspective—aware of how easily our understanding is shaped and reshaped. This environment invites me to pause, to consider how I connect with the world and with knowledge itself.
